title: Latvian ministry ditches election services provider, suggests replacements
summary_full: The Ministry of Regional Development and Smart Administration (VARAM) announced on April 21st that the contract with the developer of the election platform used in Latvian elections, AS "RIX Technologies", has been terminated.
